case_title: DIYAR GONULACAR VS. ANN MAHER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,550.00 FILED BY GONULACAR, DIYAR AS TO DEFENDANT MAHER, ANN MAHER, P. J. (AKA PATRICK MAHER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 - SERVED MAY-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAHER, ANN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY GERMAN INTERPRETER---CORNELIUS MOORE. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT P.J. MAHER WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING DATE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON P.J. MAHER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO P. J. MAHER BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-21-2014 AT 10:00 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONULACAR, DIYAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAHER, ANN $266.13 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $351.13, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUST; PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT P.J. MAHER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE; NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
